name: Alzamend Neuro Inc. Common Stock
summary: Alzamend Neuro Inc. is a preclinical stage biopharmaceutical company focused on developing novel products for the treatment of Alzheimer’s disease, dementia, and other neurodegenerative diseases. The company's research efforts are centered around innovative therapeutic approaches to address unmet medical needs in these areas. Alzamend Neuro is headquartered in Tampa, Florida.
